message:
feat(azure): add 4 missing provider streaming test scenarios + fix mocks.rs CWD bug

- Add azure_multi_paragraph, azure_tool_call_multiple, azure_bad_request_400,
  azure_rate_limit_429 VCR cassettes and test scenarios, bringing Azure from
  6 to 10 tests (parity with OpenAI/Gemini)
- Fix exec_fixture_creates_mock_scripts flaky failure caused by shell getcwd()
  error when CWD is a deleted temp dir (set explicit current_dir)
- Sync concurrent agent changes (extensions, perf reports, beads)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+{
+  "version": "1.0",
+  "test_name": "azure_bad_request_400",
+  "recorded_at": "2026-02-07T01:45:00.000Z",
+  "interactions": [
+    {
+      "request": {
+        "method": "POST",
+        "url": "https://test-resource.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/test-deployment/chat/completions?api-version=2024-02-15-preview",
+        "headers": [
+          ["api-key", "[REDACTED]"],
+          ["Content-Type", "application/json"],
+          ["Accept", "text/event-stream"]
+        ]
+      },
+      "response": {
+        "status": 400,
+        "headers": [
+          ["Content-Type", "application/json"]
+        ],
+        "body_chunks": [
+          "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"BadRequest\",\"message\":\"Invalid request: the 'messages' field is required and must contain at least one message.\"}}"
+        ]
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+{
+  "version": "1.0",
+  "test_name": "azure_rate_limit_429",
+  "recorded_at": "2026-02-07T01:45:00.000Z",
+  "interactions": [
+    {
+      "request": {
+        "method": "POST",
+        "url": "https://test-resource.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/test-deployment/chat/completions?api-version=2024-02-15-preview",
+        "headers": [
+          ["api-key", "[REDACTED]"],
+          ["Content-Type", "application/json"],
+          ["Accept", "text/event-stream"]
+        ]
+      },
+      "response": {
+        "status": 429,
+        "headers": [
+          ["Content-Type", "application/json"],
+          ["Retry-After", "60"]
+        ],
+        "body_chunks": [
+          "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"429\",\"message\":\"Requests to the ChatCompletions_Create Operation under Azure OpenAI API version 2024-02-15-preview have exceeded token rate limit of your current Azure OpenAI S0 pricing tier.\"}}"
+        ]
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}
